alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing to benzene rings linked together by a C-C bond.
alternative_parents.name: Biphenyls and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a phenylpropane moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Phenylpropanes

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds contaning a phenoxy group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenoxy compounds

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing an ether group substituted with a benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Phenol ethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a para cresol moiety, which consists of a benzene ring bearing one hydroxyl group at ring positions 1 and 4.
alternative_parents.name: Para cresols

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a benzene ring which bears a methane group.
alternative_parents.name: Toluenes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as m-terphenyls. These are terphenyls with a structure containing the 1,3-diphenylbenzene skeleton.

direct_parent.description: Terphenyls with a structure containing the 1,3-diphenylbenzene skeleton.
direct_parent.name: M-terphenyls

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

predicted_lipidmaps_terms: Diphenyl ethers, biphenyls, dibenzyls and stilbenes (PK1309)

subclass.description: Polycyclic aromatic compounds containing a terphenyl skeleton, which consists of a benzene ring substituted with two phenyl groups. Isomers of terphenyl include m-terphenyls (1,3-diphenylbenzenes),  o-terphenyls (1,2-diphenylbenzenes),  p-terphenyls (1,4-diphenylbenzenes).
subclass.name: Terphenyls

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
